description: Names for built-in types. Provides names for type objects that correspond to Python's built-in types, useful for isinstance() checks and type comparisons.

constants.name: NoneType
constants.description: The type of None

constants.name: TypeType
constants.description: The type of type objects; alias for the built-in type

constants.name: BooleanType
constants.description: The type of True and False; alias for bool

constants.name: IntType
constants.description: The type of integers; alias for int

constants.name: LongType
constants.description: The type of long integers; alias for long

constants.name: FloatType
constants.description: The type of floating point numbers; alias for float

constants.name: ComplexType
constants.description: The type of complex numbers; alias for complex

constants.name: StringType
constants.description: The type of byte strings; alias for str

constants.name: UnicodeType
constants.description: The type of Unicode strings; alias for unicode

constants.name: TupleType
constants.description: The type of tuples; alias for tuple

constants.name: ListType
constants.description: The type of lists; alias for list

constants.name: DictType
constants.description: The type of dictionaries; alias for dict

constants.name: DictionaryType
constants.description: Alternate name for the type of dictionaries; alias for dict. Same as DictType.

constants.name: FunctionType
constants.description: The type of user-defined functions created by def statements

constants.name: LambdaType
constants.description: The type of functions created by lambda expressions. Same as FunctionType.

constants.name: GeneratorType
constants.description: The type of generator-iterator objects produced by generator functions

constants.name: CodeType
constants.description: The type of code objects such as those returned by compile()

constants.name: FrameType
constants.description: The type of frame objects found in traceback objects (tb.tb_frame)

constants.name: TracebackType
constants.description: The type of traceback objects found in sys.exc_info()[2]

constants.name: MethodType
constants.description: The type of bound methods of user-defined class instances

constants.name: BuiltinFunctionType
constants.description: The type of built-in functions like len() or sys.exit()

constants.name: BuiltinMethodType
constants.description: The type of built-in methods; alias for BuiltinFunctionType. Same object as BuiltinFunctionType.

constants.name: ModuleType
constants.description: The type of modules such as those created by import statements

constants.name: FileType
constants.description: The type of open file objects such as sys.stdout; alias for file

constants.name: ClassType
constants.description: The type of old-style (classic) class objects

constants.name: InstanceType
constants.description: The type of instances of old-style (classic) classes

constants.name: UnboundMethodType
constants.description: The type of unbound methods of user-defined classes. Same as MethodType in Python 2.7.

constants.name: StringTypes
constants.description: A tuple containing StringType and UnicodeType. Useful for isinstance() checks against any string type: isinstance(x, types.StringTypes)

constants.name: BufferType
constants.description: The type of buffer objects created by the buffer() built-in function

constants.name: SliceType
constants.description: The type of slice objects such as those created by slice() or extended slicing syntax
